occupation: Director, Programmatic DOOH, Campaign Management and Sales Support at Bell Media
headline: Programmatic DOOH, Change Management and Sales Operations Leader
summary:
I'm an operations and strategy leader with a passion for driving growth and innovation in the out-of-home advertising industry. I've successfully led teams through transformative change, from launching groundbreaking startups like Campsite to scaling global media sales organizations at Broadsign and now working on enhancing the programmatic DOOH offering and optimizing sales support workflows for operational excellence with my latest role at Bell Media / Astral.

My expertise lies in:
▶️ Strategic Planning: Architecting growth strategies and executing complex initiatives.
▶️ Operational Excellence: Streamlining processes, optimizing workflows, and leveraging technology to drive efficiency.
▶️ Team Leadership: Building high-performing teams and fostering a culture of collaboration and innovation.

Being a systems thinker with a knack for turning challenges into opportunities, I thrive on solving complex problems and building high-performing organizations, all while staying true to myself and connecting with others on a human level, and always having fun along the way!

experiences.title: Director, Programmatic DOOH, Campaign Management and Sales Support
experiences.description: - Overseeing programmatic OOH, ad ops, and sales support teams to implement measures & workflows that help drive growth. - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive process improvements and system optimizations that enhance customer experience and automate manual tasks.

experiences.title: Vice President, Digital Transformation, Programmatic DOOH & Client Services
experiences.description: - Collaborated with C-suite on strategic initiative to deliver a fully integrated solution for inventory discovery, proposal creation and campaign delivery. - Executed comprehensive change management strategy. - Boosted client service productivity and sales efficiency. - Led programmatic sales, ad operations, and client services teams. - Oversaw GTM strategy and drove revenue growth on programmatic.

experiences.title: Vice President, Media Sales Operations
experiences.description: - Built and scaled global programmatic media sales and ad ops organization. - Drove exponential revenue growth and launched new markets. - Led team of 15+ across multiple countries. - Ensured business continuity during the COVID crisis.

experiences.title: Vice President, Business Development | General Manager
experiences.description: - Led digital startup, pioneering programmatic OOH in Canada. - Generated significant revenue and secured acquisition by Broadsign. - Managed all aspects of the business, including P&L, product, engineering, and sales.

experiences.title: Director Sales Operations
experiences.description: - Increased YoY revenue growth by 40%. - Improved sales and finance alignment. - Established compensation and training plans.

experiences.title: Director, Human Resources & Various Roles
experiences.description: Summary: Director, Human Resources (2008–2012) Manager Training and Competency Development (2005–2008) Coordinator, Inventory Management and Ad Operations | Traffic Coordinator (2001–2005) - Led HR initiatives, including recruitment, training, and organizational development. - Implemented management best practices and coaching programs. - Main business stakeholder in campaign & inventory management application development projects.

education.field_of_study: Applied Human Sciences - Human Systems Intervention

recommendations:
Maarten Dollevoet

I have worked with Edith for several years, and have always found her drive for challenging the status quo, move things forward (faster), and develop new processes to do things better, inspiring! I can highly recommend Edith. She has a drive for taking on new tasks, and always created a strong team culture with every team she worked with.

Ryan Pogy

Edith is a highly skilled intuitive leader with drive to grow business, and support the team needs and nuances. She adept and translating strategy to into operation among a variety of teams. Her technical knowledge ensures teams have the tools they need and that tools are built to meet the specific use cases and workflows that build reliability and enable efficiency at scale.
